pageDescription: A reusable toolkit of interview answers, generated from your career data — not tied to any specific job posting.
placeholder: Generate with AI, or write your own answer…
guidanceRequiredHint: Answer this before generating — this can't be written without your input.

tellMeAboutYourself.title: Tell Me About Yourself
tellMeAboutYourself.description: A 2-3 minute spoken narrative connecting your background, experience, and what you're looking for next.
tellMeAboutYourself.guidance: Anything specific you want to emphasize (a turning point, what excites you right now)?

weakness.title: Biggest Weakness
weakness.description: A credible weakness with real evidence you're actively improving it.
weakness.guidance: What's a real weakness you want to address? Be honest — this needs to be authentic, not a disguised strength.

salaryExpectations.title: Salary Expectations
salaryExpectations.description: Talking points for discussing compensation confidently.
salaryExpectations.guidance: What's your target range or market research so far?

leadershipStory.title: Leadership Story
leadershipStory.description: A time you led a team or took ownership of a situation, drawn from your Story Bank.
leadershipStory.guidance: Anything specific about this story you want emphasized?

conflictStory.title: Conflict Story
conflictStory.description: A conflict with a coworker and how you resolved it, drawn from your Story Bank.
conflictStory.guidance: Anything specific about this story you want emphasized?

teamworkStory.title: Teamwork Story
teamworkStory.description: A time you worked effectively as part of a team, drawn from your Story Bank.
teamworkStory.guidance: Anything specific about this story you want emphasized?
